title: Review-mode session has no #if DEBUG fence — production binary can authenticate as developer
description: Any production binary receiving FITTRACKER_REVIEW_AUTH=authenticated authenticates as developer identity 'Regev' with token 'review-session-token'. Env var name visible in binary string table.

title: Passkey assertion accepted entirely client-side — raw WebAuthn signature used as session token
description: sessionToken set to cred.signature.base64EncodedString() — never verified by server. currentChallenge is shared mutable, concurrent passkey flows produce cross-signed assertions.
evidence: No server-side verification of WebAuthn assertion
recommended_fix: POST assertion to Supabase Edge Function for server-side verification before finishSignIn()

title: Passkey userID decode silently falls back to stale pendingUserHandle — cross-user key assignment
description: Non-UTF-8 user handles return nil, causing session with previous user's ID. EncryptionService keys not namespaced by userID — cross-assigns decryption keys.
evidence: Fallback to pendingUserHandle on decode failure
recommended_fix: Hard guard, not fallback — fail the assertion if userID cannot be decoded

title: mergedAppleSession uses Apple userID as sessionToken — no formal token type contract
description: UserSession.sessionToken holds UUID, passkey sig, Supabase JWT, debug literal, or Apple userID depending on code path. No type safety.
recommended_fix: sessionToken must only hold Supabase-issued tokens. Add enum for token types.

title: restoreSession() timeout race: nil branch doesn't cancel timeout — double-resume crash risk
description: The nil branch of the token check never calls timeout.cancel(). Timeout Task runs 5 more seconds and calls continuation.resume(returning: nil) a second time — double-resume crashes in debug, UB in release.

title: JWT stored without biometric ACL — encryption keys need Face ID but JWT only needs unlocked screen
description: Full UserSession JSON with live Supabase JWT stored with only kSecAttrAccessibleWhenUnlockedThisDeviceOnly. Protection inversion: encryption requires biometrics but API access doesn't.
evidence: No .userPresence SecAccessControl on session Keychain item
recommended_fix: Add .userPresence ACL or strip backendAccessToken from persisted JSON

title: Simulator bypass sets isAuthenticated but never calls setSessionContext — all data ops fail silently
description: Every encryptRaw/decryptRaw on simulator falls through to authenticatedContext() which fails canEvaluatePolicy and throws — silently caught by loadFromDisk(). Developers see app running but all data ops fail.

title: rotateKeys() has no in-progress guard — concurrent encrypt() uses old keys producing irrecoverable ciphertext
description: Between re-encryption and finishing 3 saveKeyToKeychain calls, concurrent encrypt() uses old keys that are then overwritten. Three sequential key saves are non-atomic — process kill leaves mixed key state.
evidence: No isRotating guard, sequential key saves
recommended_fix: Add isRotating actor flag + single Keychain item for all three keys

title: HMAC timestamp uses non-canonical bitPattern encoding, never validated for max-age — replay risk
description: IEEE 754 bitPattern bytes (little-endian). Numeric value never decoded or compared to max-age. Valid blobs can be replayed indefinitely.
evidence: Timestamp in HMAC but never checked
recommended_fix: Decode and reject beyond maxAge, use bigEndian encoding

title: Keychain delete-then-add window enables concurrent key generation — data irrecoverable
description: Window where key is absent allows concurrent getOrCreateSymmetricKey() to generate new key that original write then overwrites.

title: persistToDisk() writes 5 files sequentially without transaction — mid-failure produces inconsistent state
description: A mid-sequence failure leaves on-disk files from different logical moments. loadFromDisk() succeeds but state is internally inconsistent.
evidence: Sequential file writes with no atomic swap
recommended_fix: Write to .tmp files, rename atomically with FileManager.replaceItemAt

title: PendingEmailRegistration.password is plain String in Codable @Published struct — exposed to serialization and crash reporters
description: Password exposed to accidental serialization, crash reporters, accessibility/screen-recording snapshots for entire registration flow.
recommended_fix: Remove password from struct, pass as separate parameter at API callsite only

title: evaluatePolicy [weak self] + callback timing creates silent double-auth and continuation risk
description: If AuthManager deallocated mid-auth, setSessionContext() never called despite successful biometric. Triggers silent double Face ID on next access.
recommended_fix: Capture result before Task, call setSessionContext unconditionally on success

title: signOut() clears local session before Supabase signOut completes — in-flight syncs can still write
description: Local state cleared synchronously. In-flight sync tasks with old JWT still write to remote. try? discards Supabase errors leaving remote token valid.
evidence: Synchronous local clear before await signOut
recommended_fix: Broadcast cancellation before clearing, await signOut with timeout

title: Three-way merge checksums in UserDefaults — tamperable on jailbroken device
description: Attacker can set checksum to match local, causing merge to treat any remote payload as authoritative.
